gitCommit.subject: Fix CSP-blocked bookmarklet; add silent version-check update notifications (#2)
gitCommit.body:
Fix CSP-blocked bookmarklet; add silent version-check update notifications (#2)

* chore: outline update-notification plan

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ilim-cell/webbender/sessions/ea8e9784-194d-4ee7-a932-a6acb2594a1d

Co-authored-by: ilim-cell <248271295+ilim-cell@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add version-check update notifications; keep bookmarklet self-contained for CSP safety

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ilim-cell/webbender/sessions/ea8e9784-194d-4ee7-a932-a6acb2594a1d

Co-authored-by: ilim-cell <248271295+ilim-cell@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use textContent for style elements; rename isNewerVersion vars for clarity

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ilim-cell/webbender/sessions/ea8e9784-194d-4ee7-a932-a6acb2594a1d

Co-authored-by: ilim-cell <248271295+ilim-cell@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ilim-cell <248271295+ilim-cell@users.noreply.github.com>
